chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-7047 of 2021 along with Const. P. 8028 of 2018 Const. P. 6558 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 11.08.2025 Mr. Faiz Durrani, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. K.A. Vaswani, AAG along with Mr.Ali Asghar Mahar, Focul Person of Home Department, Sindh. Mr. Ghulam Akbar Lashari, Advocate for SBCA. Mr. Akhtar Ali Mastoi, Advocate for BOR. Mr. Tatheera Fatima, Advocate for K-Electric. --------------------- Const. P. 8028 of 2018: Preliminary Progress Report has been filed by the Home Department, which is taken on record. Learned counsel for the Petitioner is directed to place on record of final Order in respect of Illegal Dispossession Act filed before the trial Court. For that purpose, adjourned to a date in office. Const. P. 7047 of 2021: Learned Counsel for the Petitioner submits that no final order has yet been passed; however, requests that this Petition (Const. P. D- 7047 of 2021) may be de-tagged from the batch of consolidated petitions and listed separately. Order accordingly. Adjourned to 04.09.2025. Const. P. 6558 of 2020: None present for the Petitioner. Since this Petition was dismissed on 19.05.2022 in limine. Office is directed not to fix this matter again in Court. JUDGE JUDGE Jamil
